user.title: Select source integrations
user.description: Choose which installed integrations the hub should aggregate. Detected integrations are pre-selected.

priority.title: Set source priority
priority.description: Order the sources from highest to lowest priority. The hub always uses the highest-priority source that is currently available.

error.no_sources: Select at least one source integration.
error.duplicate_priority: Each source can appear only once in the priority list.

abort.already_configured: Huawei Fusion Hub is already configured.

init.title: Huawei Fusion Hub options
init.description: Change source priority and alert behavior.

data.notify_on_disconnect: Notify when a source goes offline

error.duplicate_priority: Each source can appear only once in the priority list.
